title: WASM: js_cb.call1 return silently dropped; JS exceptions invisible
description: wasm/src/client.rs set_event_callback: 'let _ = js_cb.call1(...)' discards the Result<JsValue,JsValue>. If the JS event callback throws an exception, the exception is silently swallowed — no console.error, no panic, nothing. Every relay event fires the callback; a bug in JS event handling produces zero observable signal.
